name: wxcode-admin-talent-ats
title: Talent ATS Admin
description: Recruiting & applicant-tracking dashboard archetype — left sidebar with requisition switcher, topbar with period picker and avatar, 4 KPI cards (open roles / candidates / interviews / time-to-hire), kanban-style hiring pipeline, recruiting funnel SVG, candidates table, and upcoming-interviews side panel. Indigo + pink accent, light HR aesthetic.

query.en: Build me a recruiting ATS admin dashboard — left sidebar with requisition switcher, 4 KPI tiles (open roles, candidates, interviews, time-to-hire), hiring pipeline board, recruiting funnel chart, candidates table, and upcoming interviews panel.
query.zh-CN: 使用这个插件完成以下任务：Build me a recruiting ATS admin dashboard — left sidebar with requisition switcher, 4 KPI tiles (open roles, candidates, interviews, time-to-hire), hiring pipeline board, recruiting funnel chart, candidates table, and upcoming interviews panel.

provenance.note: original archetype; no third-party template reproduced
